raw.message: 女神からの甘い招待。オールインで応えよ

hook.summary: Suggestive reveal of an anime character in a bunny suit.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of character licking a lollipop followed by a full-body pose.
hook.text_overlay: HOSHIMIYA KANA CV: 上坂すみれ
hook.voiceover_transcript: あ！会長！大好き！オールイン！

scene_flow: Suggestive character reveal of Hoshimiya Kana with voiceover.
Transition to poker gameplay featuring the character's avatar.
Visual confirmation of a 'Royal Flush' win and 'All-in' bet.
Closing screen with game features and download prompt.
on_screen_text: ストロベリー ダイキリ
美少女 × ドレス × ポーカー！
audience_proxy: Young adult males interested in anime-style character collection and casual poker games.
